message:
Add list comp if-clause, @property decorator, super() support

- List comprehension: [i for i in range(5) if i > 2] now works
- @property: decorated methods auto-called on attribute access
- super(): B(A).foo() can call super().foo() to invoke parent
- Classes without __init__ get auto-generated init method

Note: core.zig files slightly over 500 lines - split in future
